title: LENNAR GROWS NEW YORK PRESENCE WITH ACQUISITION OF 1,273 HOMESITES IN TUXEDO RESERVE MASTER-PLANNED COMMUNITY
text: TUXEDO, N.Y. , Dec. 18, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Lennar, one of the nation's leading homebuilders, proudly announces the acquisition of nine neighborhoods totaling 1,273 homesites in the Tuxedo Reserve (formerly known as Tuxedo Farms) master-planned community located in Tuxedo, New York from Related Companies.

title: Lennar shares give back Thursday gains despite 4Q earnings surprise
text: Lennar (NYSE:LEN) shares fell 3.5% after hours Thursday despite the company beating expectations on the top and bottom lines with its fourth quarter results.  The dip reversed some of the stock's 6.7% gain during the Thursday trading session.

title: Home builder Lennar reports boost in fourth-quarter sales
text: Home builder Lennar Corp. LEN, +6.65% on Thursday reported sales that beat expectations in house deliveries and new orders, though the company's stock was down 4% in after-hours trading. The Miami-based company posted fourth-fiscal-quarter earnings of $1.36 billion, or $4.82 a share, compared with $1.32 billion, or $4.55 a share, for the same period a year earlier.

title: 5 Relatively Secure And Cheap Dividend Stocks To Invest In - December 2023
text: This article is part of our monthly series where we highlight five large-cap, relatively safe, dividend-paying companies offering large discounts to their historical norms. We go over our filtering process to select just five conservative DGI stocks from more than 7,500 companies that are traded on U.S. exchanges, including OTC networks. In addition to the primary list that yields just over 3%, we present two other groups of five DGI stocks each, with the goal of moderate to high yields.

title: LENNAR CORPORATION'S FOURTH QUARTER EARNINGS CONFERENCE CALL TO BE BROADCAST LIVE ON THE INTERNET
text: MIAMI , Dec. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Lennar Corporation (NYSE: LEN and LEN.B), one of the nation's largest homebuilders, announced today that the Company will release earnings for the fourth quarter ended November 30, 2023 after the market closes on December 14, 2023. Additionally, the Company will hold a conference call on December 15, 2023 at 11:00 a.m.
